title: Lena (disambiguation)
content:
'''Lena''' was a name shared by several individuals:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Lena]]''', a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancer
*"'''Lena'''", an alias used by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*'''[[Lena Cobral]]''', a [[Fregan]] trial witness
*'''[[Lena Missa]]''', a [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]

==Non-canon==
*'''[[Lena Freemaker]]''', a [[human]] [[prisoner]]

==See also==
*[[Lina (disambiguation)]]
